title: Simple Creaet
body:
## Simple Create Modpack

This is a lightweight modpack themed around [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) for Create lovers.Create is a popular technology mod.You can enjoy Create here.

If you have any questions or suggestions, you can tell me via Discord

Forge is soon!

<details>
<summary>🔥 Featrues
</summary>

1. Good Optimization

2. Decoration mod

</details>

<details>
<summary>📦 Mods</summary>

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)&[Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric)

[Farmer's Delight Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric)&[Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)

[Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)

[Paladin's Furniture Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-furniture)

And more

</details>
